output.note: County-level limit sourced from caller (county_limit_override) when provided. Baseline and ceiling values are 2026 FHFA announcement. Verify high-cost designation against FHFA county dataset for exact limit.
output.pii_note: All inputs processed locally in your browser. No data is transmitted.
output.regulatory_basis: 12 USC 1454 (Freddie Mac Charter §305); 12 USC 1717 (Fannie Mae Charter §304(b)); Housing and Economic Recovery Act 2008 §201; FHFA Annual CLL Adjustment
output.table_source: FHFA 2026 Conforming Loan Limits (FHFA.gov, Nov 2025 announcement; FullCountyLoanLimitList2026.xlsx)
